title: Tiny Ocean Pets Take Over May 16!
story: Sea-Monkeys aren't actually monkeys at all – they're tiny shrimp called brine shrimp that come to life when you add water to their dried eggs! On May 16, National Sea-Monkey Day celebrates these amazing little creatures that became popular pets in the 1960s. Kids and adults celebrate by sharing photos of their Sea-Monkey tanks, starting new colonies, and marveling at how these microscopic pets can live for up to two years. Many people post videos online showing their Sea-Monkeys swimming around in their clear containers, doing flips and tricks that really do look like tiny underwater acrobatics!
activity_question: What are Sea-Monkeys actually made of?
bonus_fact: Sea-Monkey eggs can survive in a dried state for years before coming to life!

title: Hug It Out with Nature!
story: Tree huggers unite every May 16 for National Love a Tree Day! People celebrate by literally hugging trees, planting new saplings in their yards, or decorating their favorite oak or maple with colorful ribbons. Some families have picnics under shady branches, while others post photos of themselves with their "tree best friends" on social media. Parks and schools often organize tree-planting ceremonies where kids get their hands dirty digging holes and watering baby trees. It's the perfect day to show appreciation for these amazing plants that give us oxygen and make our world greener!
activity_question: What do some people literally do to trees on National Love a Tree Day?
follow_up_question: What's your favorite thing about trees in your neighborhood?

title: Purple Power for Peace Day
story: Purple shirts, purple hats, and purple socks take over on May 16 for National Wear Purple for Peace Day! People everywhere dress in this royal color to show they want peace in the world. Kids wear purple to school, adults rock purple ties at work, and families post purple-themed photos online. The idea is simple but powerful: when we all wear the same color, we're united in hoping for a more peaceful world.
activity_question: What do people wear on National Wear Purple for Peace Day?
follow_up_question: What other colors do you think could represent important messages?
